content.problemStatement:
Chef is playing a game. Currently in the game, he is at a field full of stones. There are total **N** kinds of 
stones. There is unlimited supply of each kind of stone.  


Chef knows that one stone of kind **i** needs **Ai** minutes to pick it from the ground and it will give Chef a profit of 
**Bi** Rs. 

Chef has **K** minutes of free time. During this free time, Chef want to pick stones so as to maximize his profit. 
But he can not pick stones of different kinds, he has to pick stones of a single kind.


Please help Chef to find the maximal possible profit.
content.inputFormat: First line contains T, the number of test cases. Each test case contains two integers N and K on the first line, followed by N integers Ai on the second line, and N integers Bi on the third line.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the maximal possible profit on a new line.

sampleTestCases.explanation: If Chef picks stones of first kind he can pick 3 stones, he will get a profit of 3*4 = 12 Rs. If Chef picks stones of second kind he can pick 2 stones, he will get a profit of 2*4 = 8 Rs. If Chef picks stones of third kind he can pick 2 stones, he will get a profit of 2*5 = 10 Rs. So the maximum possible profit is 12.

If Chef picks stones of first kind he can pick 5 stones, he will get a profit of 5*3 = 15 Rs. If Chef picks stones of second kind he can pick 2 stones, he will get a profit of 2*4 = 8 Rs. So the maximum possible profit is 15.
If Chef picks stones of first kind he can pick 2 stones, he will get a profit of 2*10 = 20 Rs.

solution.approach: The key insight is to calculate the profit for each type of stone and choose the one that maximizes the profit. This can be achieved by iterating over each type of stone, calculating the number of stones that can be picked within the given time limit, and then calculating the total profit for that type of stone.
solution.timeComplexity: O(T * N) per test case, O(T * N) total.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(N) — for storing the time and profit arrays.

code.Python3:
import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline
for _ in range(int(input())):
    N, K = map(int, input().split())
    Ai = list(map(int, input().split()))
    Bi = list(map(int, input().split()))
    maxProfit = 0
    for i in range(N):
        numStones = K // Ai[i]
        profit = numStones * Bi[i]
        maxProfit = max(maxProfit, profit)
    print(maxProfit)
